query: Tell me about the companies behind my open support cases.
reasoning: The query requires comprehensive information about companies related to open support cases, which necessitates gathering details from all available agents to form a complete picture.

steps.task: Retrieve all open support cases along with their associated companies.
Using the company names from step 1, search for internal documents that may provide additional information about these companies, including communications and documents related to them.
Using the company names from step 1, gather information on the physical locations and catalog items associated with these companies.

synthesis: Combine the outputs from all steps to provide a complete overview of the companies behind the open support cases, including their details from Salesforce, any relevant documents from Graph, and location information from SmartSales.
